name: blender
description: Blender 3D scene creation — modeling, materials, asset import, AI 3D generation, Python scripting.

prerequisites.name: npx
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (npx is bundled with npm)
prerequisites.note: Needed for MCPorter to call blender-mcp tools

prerequisites.name: uvx
prerequisites.note: Needed to run blender-mcp MCP server

post_install.name: mcporter
post_install.description: MCPorter CLI for calling MCP tools from the command line

integration_test.description: Blender must be running with BlenderMCP addon connected
